did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study used Line-field confocal optical coherence tomography (LC-OCT) for imaging and relied on statistical analysis (multinomial regression with stepwise variable selection) and visual evaluation by trained dermatologists to diagnose and subtype basal cell carcinoma. No AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms were used for image analysis or result generation.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
